raw_calls.callee:
click.option(
        "--db-path",
        type=click.Path(),
        default=_default_db_path,
        help="Path to the memory database file. Defaults to the project store "
        "(./.headroom/memory.db) if present, else the global store "
        "(~/.headroom/memory.db).",
        show_default="project store if present, else global store",
    )
